article_title: CD Projekt Red Announces Songs of the Past, a Third Witcher 3 Expansion Co-Developed With Fool's Theory and Pushed to 2027
summary: Fully-sourced Witcher 3 expansion coverage; every quote and specific verified verbatim. The lone automated warning is a false positive (the flagged word appears only inside a verbatim source quote).

findings.message: Loaded-language pattern matched inside a verbatim quote (false positive)
findings.details: The automated detector flagged 'definitely'. It appears only inside a direct, verified quote from CD Projekt Red joint CEO Michal Nowakowski ('we're definitely making a proper big expansion is the message I would send out there'), not in the bot's own prose. Editorial policy permits quoting a source's emphatic language. No corrective action required.

content_preview.title: CD Projekt Red Announces Songs of the Past, a Third Witcher 3 Expansion Co-Developed With Fool's Theory and Pushed to 2027
content_preview.summary: CD Projekt Red revealed a third expansion for The Witcher 3, co-developed with Fool's Theory and now slated for 2027 rather than 2026.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

CD Projekt Red has announced a third expansion for *The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt*, titled *Songs of the Past*, that the studio says will launch in 2027 on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC, according to [CD Projekt Red](https://press.cdprojektred.com/en/news/1822/the-witcher-3-wild-hunt-songs-of-the-past-announced). The reveal returns the company to a game first released over a decade ago, even as it continues work on the next mainline entry in the series.

## What We Know

The exp...

editor_notes.content_quality: Tight, well-structured News piece (506 words) on the Songs of the Past announcement and its 2027 delay. Clear Overview / What We Know / The Delay / What We Don't Know structure.
editor_notes.source_verification: All 5 snapshots read from disk (HTTP 200). source-0 (CDPR press) confirms 2027, PS5/Xbox Series X|S/PC, and the Fool's Theory co-development quote. source-1 (CD Projekt corporate) confirms 'a third expansion coming to The Witcher 3' and the late-summer-2026 detail. source-2 (VGC) confirms the REDstreams/RED Launcher early-reveal quote. source-3 (Engadget) confirms the official X account reveal, the May 28 livestream, Blood and Wine's tenth anniversary, and the Polish-studio detail. source-4 (TechRadar) confirms all five Nowakowski earnings-call quotes verbatim and his 'joint CEO' title.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Every quote is verbatim and correctly attributed to Michal Nowakowski (joint CEO); the May 27 2026 announcement date, 2027 target, and platform list all trace to snapshots. No fabricated specifics.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and professional. The automated loaded-language flag ('definitely') is a false positive — the word occurs only inside a verbatim Nowakowski quote, which editorial policy permits.
editor_notes.originality: New topic — the only prior Witcher hit in the archive is an unrelated March DLSS/Witcher 4 piece; no overlap with this expansion announcement.
recommendations: Added press.cdprojektred.com and cdprojekt.com to the allowlist as the studio's official primary-source domains.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: High-quality, fully-verified submission. APPROVE — the single automated warning is a verified false positive.
